active.interpretation: Jupiter retrograde invited a period of internal expansion — reviewing beliefs, revisiting abandoned opportunities, and questioning what growth truly means to you. With Jupiter now direct, the wisdom gathered is ready to be applied outwardly.

upcoming.interpretation: Mercury's retrograde through bold Aries will challenge impulsive communications. Back up your data, re-read before sending, and revisit decisions made in haste. A powerful time for editing and revision.
Venus retrograde in Pisces stirs the emotional waters of love and beauty. Past relationships may resurface. This is a time to clarify your values, not to begin new romantic pursuits.
